headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -84.9)
key_insights: Fears trending up 83% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 147 quotes and 108 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and irritation today.

• The frustration score of 68.8 sits in the upper-middle range of recent activity, showing elevated but not extreme levels.

• Optimism dropped sharply from yesterday's positive 3.1 to -19.0, while fears recovered significantly from yesterday's very low point.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
